task: Replace branded iPhone mobile-scene labels with neutral smartphone copy

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion requires evidence mapped to the user-visible issue and runtime verification before final reporting.
Code and UI changes require completion evidence guard and at least one user-facing or runtime entrypoint check.

changes: Changed EDU VP device display labels so iphone, android, and mobile all render as 스마트폰 in training copy.
Updated the legacy EDU VP training page mobile-device selector label from 현재 모바일 기기 to 현재 스마트폰 and removed Android/iPhone visible brand labels.
Added a regression assertion that Day 1 mobile_scene renders 스마트폰에서 장면 고르기 and does not render iPhone.
